label: Squarish 2BR — clustered baths, MIRROR variant with carport on the left and the public LDK alongside it.

adjacencies.note: shared plumbing wall between the two baths
common's south face touches standard — the bath block is the buffer between bedrooms
common is publicly accessible — door faces the great room

soft_proximities.note: secondary pull — keeps the master-side of the wet core hugging master rather than drifting

notes: Mirror of squarish_two_bedroom_clustered_baths. The carport sits in the LEFT
side setback (front_left building void carves a 1 × 3.5 m strip out of the
building's front-left corner for the carport). To keep the bedrooms AWAY
from the carport (catalog says master/standard avoid_near carport), the
PUBLIC LDK lives on the LEFT — facing the carport, presenting the showy
side — and the PRIVATE wing (master + baths + standard) lives on the RIGHT.
Use this variant when the lot's street/driveway access naturally lands on
the LEFT side, when the right side is shielded (narrow alley, neighbor's
service wall, etc.), or when a sales/marketing requirement calls for a
mirrored elevation against an adjacent property.
All other design choices are unchanged from clustered_baths: ensuite +
common share a plumbing wall, the bath block buffers master from
standard, the LDK is a single great_room + kitchen, and the L-shape
reclaims the strip past the carport for the kitchen's rear wall.
